title: docker image next-available tag finder
description: List an image's tags from a registry v2 tags list (/v2/{repo}/tags/list) — tags, not versions: the numeric release array orders the tag, the variant suffix (-alpine, -slim) is excluded from ordering and pins compatibility instead, and rolling tags (alpine, bookworm) and commit hashes are not versions at all. The install-test is a pull-free docker manifest inspect existence/arch probe, never a docker pull.
safety: manifest inspect is a read-only registry probe — nothing is pulled or run; mock runs are synthetic — zero network, zero subprocess
